case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. LADETHRA MCFARLAND et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCFARLAND, LADETHRA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1720 15TH STREET, S.F. CA. 94103, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
